— Mike
Henderson Ranch
(541) 555-2963

Midori

subject: Henderson HND-2026-Q4 reconciliation - forward when ready?

body:

Karen mentioned you are closing out the Zoetis HND-2026-Q4 reconciliation this week. When you land the corrected per-bolus and ETA, could you forward the reconciliation docs my way once they are final? Thanks,
Priya
